title: Report on the proposed subsidy to Besson Street LLP by Lewisham London Borough Council
body: "The SAU has published its report providing advice to Lewisham Council concerning the proposed subsidy to Besson Street LLP.  The report includes the SAU’s evaluation of Lewisham Council’s assessment of compliance of its proposed subsidy with the requirements set out in the Subsidy Control Act 2022.  For more information visit the referral of the proposed subsidy to Besson Street LLP by Lewisham London Borough Council case page. "
